S.FORM: = Akihito = Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 12 jiyax 23 ka Akihito ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Japan ta sayang o kiya ka Akihito, pnaah hngkawas 1989 idas 1 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = akiħito = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka akiħito ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɟapan ta sajaŋ o kija ka akiħito, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
S.FORM: = Akihito = Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 12 jiyax 23 ka Akihito ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Japan ta sayang o kiya ka Akihito, pnaah hngkawas 1989 idas 1 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = akiħito = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka akiħito ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɟapan ta sajaŋ o kija ka akiħito, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
